name: Apple Cream Lasagne
recipeIngredient: 6 Granny Smith apples - Peeled, cored and sliced.
recipeInstructions:
1. Place noodles in a 11 x 7 inch baking dish, cover with warm water and soak for 20 minutes. Drain and set aside.
2. Meanwhile, in a saucepan, melt 1/3 cup butter over medium heat. Add apples, cover and cook for 10 minutes, or until tender, stirring occasionally. Remove from heat and stir in 3 tbsp brown sugar, pecans and cinnamon; set aside.
3. Place cream cheese and remaining brown sugar in a large bowl. Beat for 3 minutes or until light and fluffy. Beat in egg and vanilla. Fold whipped cream into cream cheese mixture in thirds and set aside.
4. Melt remaining butter. In a small bowl, combine breadcrumbs, sugar and melted butter.
5. Spread half of the apple mixture in the bottom of the baking dish. Layer with 3 noodles. Spread with half of the cream cheese mixture, and layer with 3 more noodles.
6. Spread with remaining apple mixture and layer with last three noodles.
7. Top with remaining cream mixture and sprinkle with breadcrumb mixture.
8. Bake at 305°F for 30 minutes. Let stand 20 minutes before serving. Makes 8 servings.
